scripts.build:mac: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:mac:arm64 && npm run scan:apps
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:arm64 && npm run build:win:x64
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:linux:arm64 && npm run build:linux:x64
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run verify:resources:native && npm run build:mac:arm64:raw && npm run verify:packaged:mac
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run verify:resources:native && npm run build:win:arm64:raw && npm run verify:packaged:win:arm64
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run verify:resources:native && npm run build:linux:arm64:raw && npm run verify:packaged:linux:arm64
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run verify:resources:native && npm run build:win:x64:raw && npm run verify:packaged:win:x64
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run verify:resources:native && npm run build:linux:x64:raw && npm run verify:packaged:linux:x64
scripts.verify:resources:native: node scripts/verify-resources.js --root-kind repo --mode native --onnx require-all --models all ..
scripts.verify:packaged:mac: node scripts/verify-packaged-resources.js --platform darwin --arch arm64 --mode native --onnx require-all --models all
scripts.verify:packaged:win: npm run verify:packaged:win:arm64 && npm run verify:packaged:win:x64
scripts.verify:packaged:linux: npm run verify:packaged:linux:arm64 && npm run verify:packaged:linux:x64
scripts.build:all:supported: npm run build:mac:arm64 && npm run build:win:arm64 && npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64 && npm run build:linux:x64
scripts.verify:packaged:win:arm64: node scripts/verify-packaged-resources.js --platform win32 --arch arm64 --mode native --onnx require-all --models all
scripts.verify:packaged:win:x64: node scripts/verify-packaged-resources.js --platform win32 --arch x64 --mode native --onnx require-all --models all
scripts.verify:packaged:linux:arm64: node scripts/verify-packaged-resources.js --platform linux --arch arm64 --mode native --onnx require-all --models all
scripts.verify:packaged:linux:x64: node scripts/verify-packaged-resources.js --platform linux --arch x64 --mode native --onnx require-all --models all
